allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "pages exists: $\(Test-Path pages\)"; Write-Host "app/why exists: $\(Test-Path app/why\)"; Write-Host "app/why/page.tsx exists: $\(Test-Path app/why/page.tsx\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem pages -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; Write-Host "pages/why.tsx exists: $\(Test-Path pages/why.tsx\)"; Write-Host "pages/why.jsx exists: $\(Test-Path pages/why.jsx\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.repid.dev/why" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "LEN:" $r.Content.Length; Write-Host "SNIPPET:" $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$r.Content.Length\)\))
